## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Prisma schema changes include a migration (`npx prisma migrate dev`)
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or personal paths committed
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
